enable_coherence_computation.description: Enable/disable computation of coherence for interferogram products

azimuth_blocks_number.description: Number of blocks for partitioning the scene burst along azimuth direction to compute 2D coherence histogram

range_blocks_number.description: Number of blocks for partitioning the scene burst along range direction to compute 2D coherence histogram

coherence_kernel.description: Coherence computation kernel, size along range and azimuth directions

coherence_bins_number.description: Number of coherence intensity histogram bins
